description: Operational playbook for choosing the first warehouse workflow to pilot. Pilot suitability scores are internal heuristics, not sourced statistics.

processes.process_name: Internal transport between picking and packing
processes.operational_description: Move totes, carts, or cartons from picking aisles to packing benches or consolidation areas without changing the whole warehouse layout.
processes.score_rationale: Heuristic score: this is repetitive, measurable, bounded to one route, and realistic for a first AMR/AGV pilot without a full warehouse redesign.
measurable_kpis: manual walking time reduced on the selected route
totes or carts moved per hour
route availability during agreed operating windows
operator handoff time at pickup and drop-off points
constraints: clear route with manageable pedestrian and forklift interaction
reliable Wi-Fi or local network coverage
WMS task handoff or operator tablet workflow

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: one mapped route between picking and packing zones
recommended_pilot_shape.initial_shift: day shift during week 1, then selected peak windows
recommended_pilot_shape.risk_reducer: no conveyor removal, no full WMS replacement, and manual movement remains available

processes.operational_description: Assist operators during picking by reducing walking, guiding pick flow, or moving totes through the pick path.
processes.score_rationale: Heuristic score: picking has strong labor and accuracy value, but it needs tighter workflow design and operator adoption than simple transport.
measurable_kpis: order cycle time in the pilot zone
constraints: clear SKU and order profile for the pilot zone
operator training material in Italian or bilingual format
manual picking process remains available during ramp-up

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: one picking zone and one order family
recommended_pilot_shape.risk_reducer: run alongside the existing manual pick process before conversion

processes.operational_description: Sort parcels by route, carrier, destination, or dispatch wave using a bounded sorter lane or automation cell.
processes.score_rationale: Heuristic score: throughput and mis-sort rate are easy to observe, but barcode integration and installation timing create meaningful pilot risk.
constraints: safe parcel induction and exception handling

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: one parcel family or one outbound route cluster
recommended_pilot_shape.initial_shift: evening dispatch window after supervised dry runs
recommended_pilot_shape.risk_reducer: manual fallback lane remains active during pilot

processes.operational_description: Move pallets between production, warehouse storage, staging, and dispatch areas with automated transport support.
processes.score_rationale: Heuristic score: pallet movement has visible value for forklift reduction and dispatch reliability, but mixed traffic and load safety raise the proof burden.
constraints: floor condition and load stability review
geofenced route or controlled travel area

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: one staging route or one production-to-dispatch lane
recommended_pilot_shape.risk_reducer: geofenced route and manual forklift fallback

processes.operational_description: Use a mobile robot or scanning workflow to verify stock position, count accuracy, or shelf/bin status during low-traffic windows.
processes.score_rationale: Heuristic score: scanning can be piloted in a bounded area with measurable accuracy gains, but data quality and WMS sync must be controlled.
constraints: exception review before changing official stock records

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: one aisle group or SKU category
recommended_pilot_shape.risk_reducer: report exceptions for buyer review before updating official inventory

processes.operational_description: Move components, packaging, or spare parts from warehouse storage to production-side consumption points.
processes.score_rationale: Heuristic score: the route can be repetitive and valuable, but production continuity risk requires strict pilot boundaries and manual fallback.
measurable_kpis: stockout incidents in the pilot flow
constraints: ERP, MES, or WMS task signal

recommended_pilot_shape.risk_reducer: manual tugger backup remains available during the pilot
